title: BIS Total Credit to the Non-Financial Sector — full bulk dataset (CSV, flat)
countries: ALL (world, BIS-reporting economies; IRN not a BIS reporter — KOR/TUR/USA/DEU/FRA/GBR/ITA/NLD/ESP/PRT/GRC included)
time_coverage: long historical run through most recent quarter (series start dates vary by country)
units: described in file (percent of GDP and levels; see BIS data dictionary)
license_terms: BIS Terms of Use — free for non-commercial use with attribution
notes: Full-topic bulk zip, world coverage, flat CSV format (long format with all dimensions as columns). Uncompressed CSV inside is ~74MB; zip itself 1.8MB, well under 500MB limit. BIS reports for named central banks/currency areas, not by country ISO3 uniformly — filter by BIS area code at processing time.
